Image 6: Roman Ledak

Roman Ledak

•1 review

#### What's great

I love how it learns from its own errros - like a real smart human do. After several weeks working with it I have full confidence that Vy is doing great job, releasing bunch of my time.

#### What needs improvement

Sometimes really stupid errors happen in the places human would not conduct any error. but it is a part of the Moravec paradox. So you need to be careful using it, until no errros conducted for longer period.

#### vs Alternatives

Image 7: ManusManus

Loved free tier, and believe this product would become much better in short period of time.
